titles.en: Chapter on the Reward of One Who Makes a Bequest Without Bias or Harm

text: 5414 - رَوَى اَلسَّكُونِيُّ عَنْ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ قَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ أَوْصَى فَلَمْ يَحِفْ وَ لَمْ يُضَارَّ كَانَ كَمَنْ تَصَدَّقَ بِهِ فِي حَيَاتِهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5414 - Al-Sakuni narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), that Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"Whoever makes a will without being excessive or causing harm, it is as if he gave it in charity during his lifetime."
